channel.title: Is there any step by step documentation to integrate Divi into the Frontity Theme?
channel.description:
Is there any step-by-step documentation to integrate Divi into the Frontity Theme?
I want to get and render the page content that was managed by the Divi Page builder into WordPress.

item.title: Is there any step by step documentation to integrate Divi into the Frontity Theme?
item.dc:creator: Johan
item.description:
It should be similar to Elementor, and the docs explain how that is done (and the problems is has): How to process page-builder content in Frontity - Frontity Docs

Just keep in mind that Divi is a theme with page building capabilities, and you would still need to do a lot of work on the Frontity side for it to look and feel exactly the same.

Read full topic
item.source: Is there any step by step documentation to integrate Divi into the Frontity Theme?
